description: Schema for bankruptcy4 and legal case record tracking, optimized for LLM retrieval.

columns.name: account_number
columns.description: Debtor account number. A unique reference identifier for the financial account involved in the bankruptcy action.

columns.name: client_name
columns.description: The institution or creditor client associated with the bankruptcy case. Identifies the primary customer/client record.

columns.name: open_date
columns.description: The date on which the legal case or account tracking was initiated in the system. Formatted strictly as YYYY-MM-DD.

columns.name: first_name
columns.description: The primary consumer/debtor's legal first name.

columns.name: middle_name
columns.description: The primary consumer/debtor's middle name or middle initial (if available).

columns.name: last_name
columns.description: The primary consumer/debtor's legal last name.

columns.name: ssn
columns.description: The Social Security Number of the primary consumer/debtor, formatted as a string.

columns.name: address_line_1
columns.description: Primary consumer/debtor's street address line 1.

columns.name: address_line_2
columns.description: Primary consumer/debtor's apartment, unit, suite, or additional address line 2.

columns.name: city
columns.description: The city of residence of the primary consumer/debtor.

columns.name: state
columns.description: The 2-letter standard US state abbreviation for the primary consumer/debtor's residence.

columns.name: zipcode
columns.description: The postal zip code of the primary consumer/debtor's address.

columns.name: record_type
columns.description: Status category representing the current record stage. Allowed values: New, Closed, Reopened, Update.

columns.name: match_code
columns.description: Code indicating the quality of match (e.g. name, SSN, or address alignment).

columns.name: match_score
columns.description: Confidence score representing the quality of matching, ranging from 0 (no match) to 100 (perfect match).

columns.name: consumer_id
columns.description: Unique system identifier for the primary consumer.

columns.name: consumer_type
columns.description: The entity classification of the consumer. Allowed values: Corporate, SME, Individual, Business, Partnership, Trust.

columns.name: notification_number
columns.description: Reference number of the legal notification or case notice.

columns.name: notice_type
columns.description: The classification/type of bankruptcy notice received (e.g. Chapter 7 filing notice).

columns.name: case_number
columns.description: The court docket number assigned to the legal bankruptcy proceeding (e.g., 21-12345).

columns.name: chapter
columns.description: The specific chapter of the US Bankruptcy Code filed. Common chapters: 7, 11, 13.

columns.name: original_chapter
columns.description: The initial chapter of the US Bankruptcy Code under which the case was first filed, before any subsequent conversion.

columns.name: date_filed
columns.description: The date the bankruptcy case was officially filed with the US bankruptcy court. Formatted strictly as YYYY-MM-DD.

columns.name: conversion_date
columns.description: The date the bankruptcy case was converted from the original chapter to a new chapter. Formatted strictly as YYYY-MM-DD.

columns.name: status
columns.description: The current legal status of the case. Allowed values (case-sensitive): Active, Closed, Discharged, Dismissed, Converted, Pending.

columns.name: status_date
columns.description: The date when the current status was updated or finalized. Formatted strictly as YYYY-MM-DD.

columns.name: pd_ssn
columns.description: Primary Debtor Social Security Number (SSN).

columns.name: pd_first_name
columns.description: Primary Debtor first name.

columns.name: pd_middle_name
columns.description: Primary Debtor details - Middle Name. Extracted legal entity information.

columns.name: pd_last_name
columns.description: Primary Debtor last name.

columns.name: pd_suffix
columns.description: Primary Debtor details - Suffix. Extracted legal entity information.

columns.name: pd_aka
columns.description: Primary Debtor details - Aka. Extracted legal entity information.

columns.name: pd_aka2

columns.name: pd_dba
columns.description: Primary Debtor details - Dba. Extracted legal entity information.

columns.description: Primary Debtor details - Dba2. Extracted legal entity information.

columns.name: pd_city

columns.name: pd_state
columns.description: Primary Debtor details - State. Extracted legal entity information.

columns.name: pd_zipcode
columns.description: Primary Debtor details - Zipcode. Extracted legal entity information.

columns.name: pd_phone
columns.description: Primary Debtor contact phone number.

columns.description: Indicator of status prior to opening

columns.description: Current active/inactive status flag
